summary: Hamburg Apartment Scanner — full backend + frontend integration testing. 18/18 pytest tests passed against deployed REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend Playwright e2e: login, dashboard with REAL apartment data, admin panel user/URL CRUD, logout — all PASS. Two real apartments from tenant.immomio.com displayed with full metadata (title, price €571.89 / €1296.59, rooms 1.5 / 4.5, area, district Bramfeld/Moorburg, address, landlord SAGA, image).

minor.issue: next_scan only set once at startup; not updated after each scheduled scan completes — UI countdown is purely client-side and may drift.
Uses deprecated @app.on_event; should migrate to FastAPI lifespan handlers.
Requires authentication (Depends(get_current_user)); a stale/expired cookie causes 401 on logout. Consider making logout idempotent (always clear cookies, even if not authenticated).
Self-delete check compares user_id (str) to admin['_id'] (also str, OK), but if admin's _id is ObjectId vs string this could fail silently — current behaviour OK but fragile.

issues: Countdown timer (3:00) is purely client-side and not synchronized with backend scheduler — visible drift over time.
type=text instead of type=password — passwords are shown in clear text while typing. Should be type=password with optional show/hide toggle.

action_items: (Low) Make /api/auth/logout idempotent so it never returns 401.
(Low) Change new-user-password input to type='password' in AdminPanel.jsx for security/UX.
(Low) Sync countdown with backend next_scan and update next_scan in scanning_state after each completed scan.
(Optional) Migrate startup/shutdown to FastAPI lifespan handlers.
RESEND_API_KEY is empty in backend/.env — emails won't be sent (no-op handled gracefully).
critical_code_review_comments: Auth playbook compliance: bcrypt with $2b$, httpOnly+secure+samesite=none cookies, CORS allow_origins explicit + allow_credentials=true, seed_admin updates existing admin if password changed — ALL OK.
Scraper uses real Playwright; correctly merges SAGA + DuckDuckGo + manual URLs; gracefully filters non-Hamburg.
MongoDB _id excluded via projection or converted to str — OK.
Frontend uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and withCredentials=true — OK.
No brute-force lockout / rate limiting on /api/auth/login — recommend adding (per auth playbook lockout after 5 fails).
JWT_SECRET is hardcoded in .env (not generated dynamically) — OK for preview but rotate for prod.
scan_apartments() called at startup AND every 3min; running synchronous Playwright via asyncio.to_thread is correct.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted ephemeral TEST_ users and manual URLs during testing. Cleanup performed; no leftover test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_hamburg_scanner.py covers auth, apartments (incl filters), scan, admin users CRUD, admin manual URLs CRUD, RBAC (401/403), logout. Real apartment data flows from tenant.immomio.com via Playwright through DB to UI. Two seeded manual URLs (5650db80... / 2788b147...) produce 2 apartments in DB shown on dashboard.
